untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external data (interest rate differentials between foreign countries and U.S.) that are not available in the allowed indicator set. The core logic depends on real-time interest rate calculations and carry trade fundamentals, which cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators (OHLCV, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume ratios). Monthly rebalancing based on volatility-adjusted position sizing also requires portfolio-level logic not supported by single-instrument indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a macro/fixed-income carry trade strategy that requires external interest rate data sources and portfolio rebalancing logic. The technical indicators provided cannot capture interest rate differentials or cross-country yield spreads. A practical implementation would need integration with a rates database (e.g., Bloomberg, FRED) and position-level volatility tracking across multiple currency pairs.
